# Vehicle Trip Segmentation

> Automatically detects trip start and end from gear state signals, records position telemetry, and aggregates each completed trip into a drive record with distance, duration, and energy metadata.

**Category:** Asset · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** vehicle · trip · telemetry · odometer · ev · fleet

## What this does

Automatically detects trip start and end from gear state signals, records position telemetry, and aggregates each completed trip into a drive record with distance, duration, and energy metadata.

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **trip_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Trip ID
- **vehicle_id** *(text, required)* — Vehicle ID
- **start_date** *(datetime, required)* — Start Date
- **end_date** *(datetime, optional)* — End Date
- **start_odometer_km** *(number, required)* — Start Odometer (km)
- **end_odometer_km** *(number, optional)* — End Odometer (km)
- **distance_km** *(number, optional)* — Distance (km)
- **duration_min** *(number, optional)* — Duration (minutes)
- **start_battery_level** *(number, optional)* — Start Battery Level (%)
- **end_battery_level** *(number, optional)* — End Battery Level (%)
- **start_ideal_range_km** *(number, optional)* — Start Ideal Range (km)
- **end_ideal_range_km** *(number, optional)* — End Ideal Range (km)
- **speed_max_kmh** *(number, optional)* — Max Speed (km/h)
- **power_max_kw** *(number, optional)* — Max Power (kW)
- **power_min_kw** *(number, optional)* — Min Power / Max Regen (kW)
- **ascent_m** *(number, optional)* — Total Ascent (m)
- **descent_m** *(number, optional)* — Total Descent (m)
- **outside_temp_avg** *(number, optional)* — Avg Outside Temp (°C)
- **position_count** *(number, optional)* — Position Readings

## What must be true

- **trip_start_on_motion_gear:** A trip starts when the vehicle shifts into any motion gear (D, N, or R)
- **minimum_distance_threshold:** A trip must have at least 2 recorded positions and a distance of at least 0.01 km (10 metres) to be retained
- **negative_distance_discarded:** A trip with negative distance (end odometer less than start) is discarded — indicates sensor glitch or API error
- **offline_during_drive:** If the vehicle goes offline during a trip the driving state is maintained for up to 15 minutes before auto-completing with the last known data
- **distance_from_odometer:** Distance is derived from odometer delta (end minus start), not from GPS geometry — odometer is converted from the API native unit to kilometres
- **aggregates_on_close:** Speed max, power min/max, ascent, descent, and avg temperature are computed from the position time series when the trip closes

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Trip Started** — when no trip is currently in progress for this vehicle; shift_state in ["D","N","R"], then Trip record created; position collection begins.
- **Position Recorded** — when trip is currently in_progress for this vehicle, then Position record appended; trip telemetry grows.
- **Trip Completed** — when trip is currently in_progress; shift_state in ["P"]; position_count >= 2; distance_km gte 0.01, then Trip record finalised with all aggregate metrics.
- **Trip Auto Completed Offline** — when trip is currently in_progress; vehicle has been offline for more than 15 consecutive minutes, then Trip closed with last known data; prevents indefinitely open records.

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Trip Discarded Insufficient Data** — when trip is currently in_progress; position_count < 2 OR distance_km lt 0.01 OR distance_km lt 0, then Trip and positions deleted; no record retained. *(error: `TRIP_BELOW_THRESHOLD`)*

## Errors it can return

- `TRIP_BELOW_THRESHOLD` — Trip did not meet minimum distance or data requirements and was discarded.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-state-machine** *(required)*
- **trip-energy-consumption** *(required)*
- **trip-replay** *(recommended)*
- **geofence-places** *(recommended)*
- **odometer-validation** *(recommended)*
